isEmail: must be a valid email address
numberCode: {property} must be a string of 13 characters
isIn: {property} must be one of the following values: {constraint1}
isImage: {property} must be a URL with extension .jpg or .png
isArrayUUID: {property} must be an array of valid UUIDs
isArrayString: {property} must be an array of strings
userRol: {property} must be one of the following: SUPERADMIN or USER
